top_signals.title: US freezes $131M in Iran-linked crypto as Middle East tensions rise
top_signals.summary: “US Treasury is committed to disrupting and degrading Iran’s illicit financial activities, including its abuse of digital assets,” US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Tuesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: European firms plan exo-atmospheric interceptor for 2027 test
top_signals.summary: Bliksem EXO is meant to defeat ballistic threats including Russia’s intermediate-range Oreshnik missile with separating and maneuvering re-entry vehicles.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Russia accused of planning attacks on Baltic or Polish infrastructure
top_signals.summary: Lithuania’s president says intelligence points to ‘targeted’ kinetic operations against energy or transport assets
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: VAT is Burnham’s best tax-raising tool if UK public finances go off track, says OECD
top_signals.summary: New report argues long-term reforms should focus on spending restraint, including end to pensions triple lock
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SonicWall warns of SMA1000 flaws exploited in zero-day attacks, patch now
top_signals.summary: SonicWall warns that threat actors have been exploiting two SMA1000 vulnerabilities, tracked as CVE-2026-15409 and CVE-2026-15410, in zero-day attacks and urges customers to install the newly released security updates. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: Recommendations of the Transatlantic Taskforce for Markets of the Future
top_signals.summary: Recommendations of the Transatlantic Taskforce for Markets of the Future to advance UK-US financial services collaboration on digital assets and capital markets

top_signals.title: EU leaders eye social media ban for children under age 13
top_signals.summary: “While ultimately it is up to parents to decide when children get their first smartphones, what we already have is a consensus that there needs to be a start date for the age children can join social media,” says European Commission President Ursula van der Leyen.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: PayPal jumps 16% in premarket on report of Stripe, Advent $53 billion takeover offer
top_signals.summary: Stripe and Advent International have reportedly made a joint offer to acquire PayPal Holdings Inc for $60.50 per share, in a deal that would value the payments company at more than $53 billion.

top_signals.title: EU law on nitrates pollution remains effective, with scope for smarter implementation
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 15 Jul 2026 The European Commission today published the first comprehensive evaluation of the Nitrates Directive since its adoption in 1991.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Lessons Learned from CISA’s Recent GitHub Leak
top_signals.summary: The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has issued a postmortem on a data leak in which a contractor published dozens of internal CISA credentials -- including AWS Govcloud keys -- in a public GitHub repository for almost six months before being notified by KrebsOnSecurity. Experts say the gaps identified in the agency's initial response provide important lessons that all security teams should absorb.
